# Let Us Sing Together

> [!info] 💧 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Spirit

*Song.*

---

Play only if you control a hero with the printed **_Minstrel_** trait.
Attach to a character. Limit 1 per character. Attached character gets +1 WP and gains the **_Minstrel_** trait.
